description: MemBackend (secretx-mem/src/lib.rs:106) holds Arc<RwLock<Map>> and String, both cheaply cloneable. MemStore's doc says 'Clone is cheap — clones share the same underlying map' but MemBackend (which holds the same Arc) doesn't impl Clone. Users who need multiple handles to the same key must call store.backend(key) again, allocating a new String unnecessarily.
title: MemBackend missing Clone impl
